title: poa nemoralis subsp. lapponica
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. lapponica, also known as the Lapponian meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Poa nemoralis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis subsp. lapponica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
